title: Introduction to Arduino
description: Our very first session with hardware — blinking LEDs, reading pushbuttons, and driving a small buzzer. We set up the Arduino IDE, wrote our first sketch, and learned the difference between digital and analog I/O. The session ended with a mini challenge: build a traffic light sequencer using three LEDs and a button that triggers a pedestrian-crossing mode. Simple, but it made the fundamentals click for the whole team.
